data.name: Code L.U.S.T
data.detailed_description:
Dive into the neon-drenched, cyberpunk world of Code Lust, where hacking, heists, and hilarious futanari fantasies collide in the horniest adult game you’ll ever play! Take control of Jett Ryde, a cheeky mercenary hacker, as he navigates a wild story of stealing the BioSynth Chip—a device that transforms anyone into a futanari powerhouse.

Experience a gripping narrative through stunning, high-quality comics that set the stage for each steamy encounter. Follow Jett’s outrageous journey through neon-lit alleys, ruined labs, and secret chambers, where every scene leads to mind-blowing futanari sex. The comics are your gateway to a world of seduction, betrayal, and absurd humor—perfectly paving the way for the action to heat up!

Once the story unfolds, it’s time to get hands-on! Engage in explicit, customizable sex scenes with multiple poses, including exclusives tailored to each scenario. Unleash your wildest desires with features like spanking, blowjobs, boob jiggle, waist or head grabs, threesomes, and gags—all designed to satisfy your futanari fetish! The more pleasure you deliver, the more your Intensity Meter rises. Fill it to unlock the epic Finisher Moneyshot, with a variety of steamy options to choose from.

This game is all about futanaris—sexy, powerful, and unapologetically hot! Watch Jett and his companions transform, explore their enhanced bodies, and dive into the most pornographic, futanari-driven action imaginable. It’s crude, it’s bold, and it’s packed with laugh-out-loud moments that make every thrust a comedic masterpiece.

  • High-quality comic-driven story with a hilarious futanari twist.

  • Deeply customizable sex scenes with exclusive poses per chapter.

  • Interactive mechanics: spanking, blowjobs, boob jiggle, grabs, threesomes, gags, and more!

  • Intensity Meter to unlock explosive Finisher Moneyshots.

  • Unashamedly porno, hilariously dirty, and proudly futanari-focused.

Get ready to run, hack, and hump your way through Code Lust—the ultimate adult gaming experience where laughter meets lust in a neon-soaked future!

data.short_description: Hack, hump, and laugh in this neon-soaked cyberpunk futanari adventure! Play Jett Ryde, as he steals the futanari-transforming BioSynth Chip. Enjoy high-quality comics leading to customizable sex scenes with poses, spanking, blowjobs, threesomes, and finishers in this porno-packed futanari fest!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • Processor: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
  • Storage: 6 GB available space
  • VR Support: Quest, Rift, Vive and Index are supported
